name: Tailwind
comment:
Type-safe Tailwind CSS for Elm.

This module provides the `Tailwind` type and all utility functions.
Use `classes` to convert a list of Tailwind values to an `Html.Attribute`.


## Core

@docs Tailwind, classes, batch, raw, toClass


## Utilities

@docs p, px, py, pt, pr, pb, pl, m, mx, my, mt, mr, mb, ml, neg_m, neg_mx, neg_my, neg_mt, neg_mr, neg_mb, neg_ml, gap, gap_x, gap_y, w, w_1over2, w_1over3, w_2over3, w_1over4, w_2over4, w_3over4, unions.name: Tailwind
unions.comment:
A type representing a Tailwind CSS class or set of classes.

While the constructor is exposed for internal use by Tailwind.Breakpoints,
you should use the utility functions in this module to create values
rather than constructing them directly.

values.name: backdrop_blur_none
batch
values.comment:
Combine multiple Tailwind values into one.

Useful for defining reusable style groups:

    buttonStyles : Tailwind
    buttonStyles =
        batch
            [ Tw.px s4
            , Tw.py s2
            , Tw.rounded
            , Tw.bg_color (blue s500)
            , hover [ Tw.bg_color (blue s600) ]
            ]

values.name: bg_gradient_to_bl
values.comment:
--tw-gradient-position: to bottom left in oklab,;
  background-image: linear-gradient(var(--tw-gradient-stops));

values.name: bg_gradient_to_br
values.comment:
--tw-gradient-position: to bottom right in oklab,;
  background-image: linear-gradient(var(--tw-gradient-stops));

values.name: bg_gradient_to_tl
values.comment:
--tw-gradient-position: to top left in oklab,;
  background-image: linear-gradient(var(--tw-gradient-stops));

values.name: bg_gradient_to_tr
values.comment:
--tw-gradient-position: to top right in oklab,;
  background-image: linear-gradient(var(--tw-gradient-stops));

values.name: blur_none
values.comment:
--tw-blur:  ;
  filter: var(--tw-blur,) var(--tw-brightness,) var(--tw-contrast,) var(--tw-grayscale,) var(--tw-hue-rotate,) var(--tw-invert,) var(--tw-saturate,) var(--tw-sepia,) var(--tw-drop-shadow,);

values.name: classes
contain_inline_size
values.comment:
--tw-contain-size: inline-size;
  contain: var(--tw-contain-size,) var(--tw-contain-layout,) var(--tw-contain-paint,) var(--tw-contain-style,);

values.name: contain_layout
values.comment:
--tw-contain-layout: layout;
  contain: var(--tw-contain-size,) var(--tw-contain-layout,) var(--tw-contain-paint,) var(--tw-contain-style,);

values.name: contain_paint
values.comment:
--tw-contain-paint: paint;
  contain: var(--tw-contain-size,) var(--tw-contain-layout,) var(--tw-contain-paint,) var(--tw-contain-style,);

values.name: contain_size
values.comment:
--tw-contain-size: size;
  contain: var(--tw-contain-size,) var(--tw-contain-layout,) var(--tw-contain-paint,) var(--tw-contain-style,);

values.name: contain_style
values.comment:
--tw-contain-style: style;
  contain: var(--tw-contain-size,) var(--tw-contain-layout,) var(--tw-contain-paint,) var(--tw-contain-style,);

values.name: diagonal_fractions
values.comment:
--tw-numeric-fraction: diagonal-fractions;
  font-variant-numeric: var(--tw-ordinal,) var(--tw-slashed-zero,) var(--tw-numeric-figure,) var(--tw-numeric-spacing,) var(--tw-numeric-fraction,);

values.name: drop_shadow_none
values.comment:
--tw-drop-shadow:  ;
  filter: var(--tw-blur,) var(--tw-brightness,) var(--tw-contrast,) var(--tw-grayscale,) var(--tw-hue-rotate,) var(--tw-invert,) var(--tw-saturate,) var(--tw-sepia,) var(--tw-drop-shadow,);

values.name: line_clamp_none
lining_nums
values.comment:
--tw-numeric-figure: lining-nums;
  font-variant-numeric: var(--tw-ordinal,) var(--tw-slashed-zero,) var(--tw-numeric-figure,) var(--tw-numeric-spacing,) var(--tw-numeric-fraction,);

values.name: neg_space_x_px
neg_space_y_px
not_sr_only
oldstyle_nums
values.comment:
--tw-numeric-figure: oldstyle-nums;
  font-variant-numeric: var(--tw-ordinal,) var(--tw-slashed-zero,) var(--tw-numeric-figure,) var(--tw-numeric-spacing,) var(--tw-numeric-fraction,);

values.name: ordinal
values.comment:
--tw-ordinal: ordinal;
  font-variant-numeric: var(--tw-ordinal,) var(--tw-slashed-zero,) var(--tw-numeric-figure,) var(--tw-numeric-spacing,) var(--tw-numeric-fraction,);

values.name: outline_hidden
proportional_nums
values.comment:
--tw-numeric-spacing: proportional-nums;
  font-variant-numeric: var(--tw-ordinal,) var(--tw-slashed-zero,) var(--tw-numeric-figure,) var(--tw-numeric-spacing,) var(--tw-numeric-fraction,);

values.name: raw
values.comment:
Escape hatch for arbitrary class names not covered by the API.

    raw "custom-class"

    raw "[scroll-snap-type:x_mandatory]"  -- Tailwind arbitrary value syntax

Use sparingly - these won't be type-checked!

values.name: shadow
values.comment:
--tw-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 var(--tw-shadow-color, rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1)), 0 1px 2px -1px var(--tw-shadow-color, rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1));
  box-shadow: var(--tw-inset-shadow), var(--tw-inset-ring-shadow), var(--tw-ring-offset-shadow), var(--tw-ring-shadow), var(--tw-shadow);

values.name: shadow_none
values.comment:
--tw-shadow: 0 0 #0000;
  box-shadow: var(--tw-inset-shadow), var(--tw-inset-ring-shadow), var(--tw-ring-offset-shadow), var(--tw-ring-shadow), var(--tw-shadow);

values.name: slashed_zero
values.comment:
--tw-slashed-zero: slashed-zero;
  font-variant-numeric: var(--tw-ordinal,) var(--tw-slashed-zero,) var(--tw-numeric-figure,) var(--tw-numeric-spacing,) var(--tw-numeric-fraction,);

values.name: space_x_px
space_y_px
sr_only
stacked_fractions
values.comment:
--tw-numeric-fraction: stacked-fractions;
  font-variant-numeric: var(--tw-ordinal,) var(--tw-slashed-zero,) var(--tw-numeric-figure,) var(--tw-numeric-spacing,) var(--tw-numeric-fraction,);

values.name: tabular_nums
values.comment:
--tw-numeric-spacing: tabular-nums;
  font-variant-numeric: var(--tw-ordinal,) var(--tw-slashed-zero,) var(--tw-numeric-figure,) var(--tw-numeric-spacing,) var(--tw-numeric-fraction,);

values.name: toClass
values.comment:
Extract the class string from a Tailwind value.

Useful for interop with other libraries or debugging.

values.name: transform_cpu
values.comment: transform: var(--tw-rotate-x) var(--tw-rotate-y) var(--tw-rotate-z) var(--tw-skew-x) var(--tw-skew-y);

values.name: transform_gpu
values.comment: transform: translateZ(0) var(--tw-rotate-x) var(--tw-rotate-y) var(--tw-rotate-z) var(--tw-skew-x) var(--tw-skew-y);

transition_all

name: Tailwind.Breakpoints
comment:
Responsive breakpoints and state variants for Tailwind CSS.

@docs sm, md, lg, xl, n2xl, hover, focus, active, disabled, visited, focus_within, focus_visible, first, last, odd, even, dark, group_hover, withVariant

name: Tailwind.Theme

unions.name: Color
unions.comment:
A color value that can be used with color utilities like `text_color`, `bg_color`, etc.

Colors are created by applying a shade to a color name like `blue s500`.

unions.name: Shade
unions.comment:
A color shade (50, 100, 200, ... 950).

Represents the lightness level where 50 is lightest and 950 is darkest.

unions.name: SimpleColor
unions.comment: A simple color without shades (white, black, transparent, etc.).

unions.name: Spacing
unions.comment: A Tailwind spacing value from the default scale.

values.name: amber
values.comment: Amber color. Apply a shade: `amber s500`

values.name: blue
values.comment: Blue color. Apply a shade: `blue s500`

values.name: colorToString
values.comment: Convert a Color to its CSS class string suffix.

values.name: cyan
values.comment: Cyan color. Apply a shade: `cyan s500`

values.name: emerald
values.comment: Emerald color. Apply a shade: `emerald s500`

values.name: fuchsia
values.comment: Fuchsia color. Apply a shade: `fuchsia s500`

values.name: gray
values.comment: Gray color. Apply a shade: `gray s500`

values.name: green
values.comment: Green color. Apply a shade: `green s500`

values.name: indigo
values.comment: Indigo color. Apply a shade: `indigo s500`

values.name: lime
values.comment: Lime color. Apply a shade: `lime s500`

values.name: neutral
values.comment: Neutral color. Apply a shade: `neutral s500`

values.name: orange
values.comment: Orange color. Apply a shade: `orange s500`
